item.title: Reminder that Google is evil
item.description:
Sauce: https://keepandroidopen.org Viral Edit: Please help spread this website. The fact that this post went viral shows the lack of visibility. This topic requires visibility so that users and developers start talking about it more, regulators and governments around the world become aware of it, court cases may be built against it. This is Google's first new step of likely many steps toward a full phone takeover and further exploitation of both users and developers. If we let these things happen silently, we're passive enablers. Google announcement: https://developer.android.com/developer-verification Google's documented track record: https://www.aclu.org/news/free-speech/app-store-oligopoly https://www.eff.org/deeplinks/2025/11/application-gatekeeping-ever-expanding-pathway-internet-censorship Contact your regulators: https://keepandroidopen.org/cta/#consumers Change.org petition: https://www.change.org/p/stop-google-from-limiting-apk-file-usage/ Read and share the open letter: https://keepandroidopen.org/open-letter Tell Google what you think: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfN3UQeNspQsZCO2ITkdzMxv81rJDEGGjO-UIDDY28Rz_GEVA/viewform?pli=1 F-Droid privacy centric app store: https://f-droid.org/ Fight back. Don't look away please.
Sauce: https://keepandroidopen.org
item.dc:creator: ongabonga

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @tanbeliaart did this painting of NYC. Love it. Check out their other posts for more.
27 Man Tax: Gauthier Battoue
“The universe is an intelligence test.” - Timothy Leary So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: She places it modestly, yet accurately
item.description: I still go out for walks late at night. I just make sure to carry the right gear and I also know how to use my limbs. Regardless, women shouldn't *have* to be on guard at all times. The patriarchy has to end.

item.title: Good Vibrations Vol. 2 ((d-_-b))
item.description:
Let's dive in! -headphones highly recommended- Dancer: chloegreynolds
2. Raining Drummer IG: frankwankbeats
3. Scratching Cymbals Drummer IG: reubenspyker
4. Body control Dancers IG: squiboycally, callytrappy
5. Alexey Arkhipovsky - Cinderella https://youtu.be/OvLe56-aOuA
6. Monday Blues Guitarist: Sierra Marie IG: sierramarie.1
7. Ethan Hibbs IG: ethan_hibbs
8. Guitar Synth Guitarist IG: toast_
9. It's nothing to her IG: sprites_music
10. SWOOOORD IG: Channing.Watson Instrument: First bass TALHARPA
11. What anime does this sound like? IG: dantalked
12. Time for some coffee IG: iloveflowersbctheyloveme
13. Sand Friction?! Did the movie Dune use this? Singer IG: rebeccaelatiki
14. Cool Pianist IG: alfonsopedutomusic
15. Turn the volume Up! <33333 Musician IG: yosoytrips, victoriacanal Song: Beatles - Blackbird Cover (Radiohead remix)
16. Lemonade on a lazy summer afternoon IG: noah_fuerbringer
17. Flamenco! Guitarist IG: rodolphebabignan
18. Interesting vibe, also hungry now
19. Chill vibes Drummer IG: ashsoan
20. Echo ᴱᶜʰᵒ ᵉᶜʰᵒ Guitarist IG: benwoodbenwoodbenwood
21. Passacaglia by George Frideric Handel Pianist IG: ada.zborowska.piano
22. Black Magic Fuckery Singer IG: blakefarfan
23. Earth song Singer IG: itsalchemysound
24. Eyes closed? Pianist IG: anm.piano
25. Holm by EMEL Guitarist IG: amjadzeyad Original song: https://youtu.be/d2SNX3bfYKw
26. Noir Singer IG: thatbulmoon
28. Fun times Guitarist IG: just.torre
29. Euphoria Musician: Abel Selaocoe IG: flageystudios
30. How magic is made Magician: Jacob Collier IG: whitemusestudio
Thanks for listening! As always, take some time for yourself today. Everything else can wait. You owe it to yourself. Happy Friday! Vol 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/sXuVraa
item.dc:creator: TheLastSpaceman

item.title: Cat distribution system finds another victim
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Alrighty, let's learn you all a thing
item.description:
Alright, ladies, gents, and everyone outaide of those labels, time to learn you a thing about your food. Specifically, your meat. It also happens to be about a year since my last installment, so i guess it's time to stop procrastinating. Anyway. This is a Ribeye loin subprimal. In particular, this is Wagyu Ribeye, and therefore costs more than my paycheck. Which is fucked up, but that's what labor looks like when you peel back capitalism and see the underpinings. This one is semi cleaned because i was busy doing my job and thought 'Wait, when will i be doing a full breakdown again? The doofuses on Imgur woukd love to see this.' So i stopped, and snapped a pic, and here we are. What? The show is below. Get to it.
Here i've peeled back layers of fat until i find the SEAM where the various layers change their bias, which indicates the line to cut. I've capitalized this word so you understand it's important vocabulary, and you need to understand it. Or you can ignore it because you read posts for the love of the game and not to learn new shit. No judgement either way, im not here to force you to learn.
Here i've continued to peel the layers down the Ribeye (longissimus dorsi for you anatomy fans), which now allows me to pull the chain (or costarum) which is a line of mostly fat that runs along the underside of the ribeye. For me, that means there are three muscles left to separate.
A nice little cross section of the chain. I'll split this, fat to the trash and meat to my grind barrel. I save about 100lbs of fat in my freezer for counter sales, and the rest is binned. PARDON THE USED GLOVE, I WAS VERY RAPIDLY CHANGING IN AND OUT OF GLOVES TO MAKE SURE NO CROSS CONTAMINATION OCCURED BETWEEN PHONE AND MEAT BECAUSE THAT'S GROSS.
Flipping it over, you'll see a very obvious seam point on the forward side or chuck end of the ribeye. This is the begining of our ribeye cap (i know you were waiting for it, it's the spinalis dorsi). Begin your incision on the chuck end as the muscle will more easily part, which makes life easier as you dig deeper into this seam.
Cutting into this seam will become much easier once you get it started and can begin to manually pull the muscles apart. Once you can, it's simple to use long and shallow slices to gently separate the pieces without damaging them... If you do fuck up and create a slab of meat that looks like you pissed off a cat version of freddy kruger that sees you dreaming of a perfect steak, it doesn't matter. You're likely doing this for yourself and can make happy little accidents. However. I'm a paid professional that has to sell a special in the restaurant, so i can't fuck around. Point is, don't compare yourself to someone elses benchmark, compare yourself to the person you were yesterday.
This right here? This shit right here? Hidden cut that gets forgotten in the ribeye world, and the reason that a chuck end diamond ribeye is the best steak to come out of a ribeye. This doesn't have a modern name, but the muscle is the complexus. It's almost like a little, hidden, secret tenderloin.
Seamed down, last little snick and bam. Hidden delight of a chunk of meat.
Seam it, pull it, put it. That's butchery. Seam it out, pull it apart, put it. away
This is fun. This slab of longissimus has all of the fat that runs down the ribeye. I'm holding the central bulb,and you can see the various layers going both ways. This gets cut off, because there's a layer of relatively thick silverskin hidden underneath.
Peeling silver. Always peeling silver. It's fun when you nail the technique.
As little waste as possible in every cut. Every gram i throw away is money we just piss into the dumpster. So to make money after trimming, you need to use everything you can. The spinalis makes this easy by having long strips of distinct silver.
Down to the silver on the longissimus, and time to peel. Why? Because silverskin sucks eat, and for these prices nothing on the plate should suck. It's a pride thing.
Separated pieces, layed out for the next steps of cleaning and sizing. We're making a petite prime roast with the longissimus and a stuffed roll roast with the spinalis. Rather, i guess I'm making the stuff and the kitchen is gonna portion and serve since i'll be in charge of the cook before service.
Spinalis and my stuffing mixture. It's blistered tomato and arugula in a panko mix. There are more ingredients, but im not here to teach you my recipes.
Here she is, tied, sealed, and labeled BECAUSE IM A FUCKING PRO AND WE DONT PUT SHIT IN THE COOLER WITHOUT LABELS, RIGHT KYLE?????
Same treatment as above, tied, sealed, labeled. We had to tie the roll for what i hope are obvious fucking reasons. But the longissimus is a different reason. See that center seam? I had to cut down into the meat to remove the silverskin. So, to prevent issues with temping during the cooking, you tie it and create a more even shape. The more you know. Here it is, second installment of 'time to teach usersub about meat'. Enjoy it. Or don't. Does it really, truly matter to either of us?
item.dc:creator: Stoneagedudeman

item.title: Return of the meme: 1667 (technical weather)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
What a wild ride. Also, he wrote some banger poetry too.
This is Big Pippin Energy, right here
There's also preliminary evidence that their stomach acid can even destroy prion diseases like Deer Wasting Disease.
I think I may be in one of the few jobs that actually benefits from Technical Weather.
I wish someone would give me head scritches like the ones I give Pippin.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I'm sorry. What you thinking about? [Conure gibberish stream lasting for about 15 seconds] beep screeeech?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: GovBrief Today #448
item.description: Amnesty International warned the world today about the United States, which co-hosts the World Cup in seven weeks. Amnesty tracks human rights abuses in places like Russia, Belarus, and North Korea. Today it joined 120 civil society groups in warning that the United States is now a dangerous place for foreign visitors. The coalition told fans to download an app that alerts their families if they are detained. Iran's football federation already said its team won't come despite qualifying, after Trump posted that America couldn't guarantee the team's safety. Today a U.S. envoy pitched Trump and FIFA on replacing Iran with Italy. On day 57 of war with Iran and more than 3,500 Iranians killed, the White House is working the bracket. Call your representatives through 5 Calls and Resistbot and demand Congress bar ICE from World Cup venues. We've emailed 7,100+ stories over 448 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Easy click links, data, images at the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260423-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr23 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/cannabis-reclass [3] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-compliance [4] https://go.govbrief.today/beltsville-closing [5] https://go.govbrief.today/stripes-ombudsman [6] https://go.govbrief.today/maduro-bet [7] https://go.govbrief.today/amnesty-warning [8] https://go.govbrief.today/1-gold-visa [9] https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-smart-glasses [10] https://go.govbrief.today/lag-ntsb [11] https://go.govbrief.today/noem-home [12] https://go.govbrief.today/boulder-family Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
